projectInfo.name: spring-petclinic-ci #5
projectInfo.credits: This product uses the NVD API but is not endorsed or certified by the NVD. This report contains data retrieved from the National Vulnerability Database: https://nvd.nist.gov, Github Advisory Database (via NPM Audit API): https://github.com/advisories/, and the RetireJS community.

dependency.description: HdrHistogram supports the recording and analyzing sampled data value counts across a configurable integer value range with configurable value precision within the range. Value precision is expressed as the number of significant digits in the value recording, and provides control over value quantization behavior across the value range and the subsequent value resolution at any given level.
dependency.license: Public Domain, per Creative Commons CC0: http://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/ BSD-2-Clause: https://opensource.org/licenses/BSD-2-Clause

dependency.description: LatencyUtils is a package that provides latency recording and reporting utilities.
dependency.license: Public Domain, per Creative Commons CC0: http://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/

dependency.description: The AspectJ weaver applies aspects to Java classes. It can be used as a Java agent in order to apply load-time weaving (LTW) during class-loading and also contains the AspectJ runtime classes.
Powerful, fast and easy to use HTML and XML parser for Java

vulnerability.name: CVE-2024-6484
vulnerability.description:
A vulnerability has been identified in Bootstrap that exposes users to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks. The issue is present in the carousel component, where the data-slide and data-slide-to attributes can be exploited through the href attribute of an <a> tag due to inadequate sanitization. This vulnerability could potentially enable attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript within the victim's browser.
Sonatype's research suggests that this CVE's details differ from those defined at NVD. See https://ossindex.sonatype.org/vulnerability/CVE-2024-6484 for details

reference.name: [CVE-2024-6484] CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

vulnerability.name: CVE-2024-6531
vulnerability.description:
A vulnerability has been identified in Bootstrap that exposes users to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks. The issue is present in the carousel component, where the data-slide and data-slide-to attributes can be exploited through the href attribute of an <a> tag due to inadequate sanitization. This vulnerability could potentially enable attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript within the victim's browser.
Sonatype's research suggests that this CVE's details differ from those defined at NVD. See https://ossindex.sonatype.org/vulnerability/CVE-2024-6531 for details

reference.name: [CVE-2024-6531] CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

dependency.description: Byte Buddy is a Java library for creating Java classes at run time. This artifact is a build of Byte Buddy with all ASM dependencies repackaged into its own name space.
checker-qual contains annotations (type qualifiers) that a programmer writes to specify Java code for type-checking by the Checker Framework.
Library for introspecting types with full generic information including resolving of field and method types.
Error Prone is a static analysis tool for Java that catches common programming mistakes at compile-time.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2018-14335
vulnerability.description:
h2database - Improper Link Resolution Before File Access
The software attempts to access a file based on the filename, but it does not properly prevent that filename from identifying a link or shortcut that resolves to an unintended resource.

reference.name: [CVE-2018-14335] CWE-59: Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')

dependency.description: Common reflection code used in support of annotation processing

dependency.license: GNU Library General Public License v2.1 or later: https://www.opensource.org/licenses/LGPL-2.1

dependency.description: Hibernate's Jakarta Bean Validation reference implementation.
Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON
General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

dependency.license: Eclipse Public License v. 2.0: http://www.eclipse.org/legal/epl-2.0 Eclipse Distribution License v. 1.0: http://www.eclipse.org/org/documents/edl-v10.php

dependency.description: Jakarta XML Binding API 4.0 Design Specification
JAXB Core module. Contains sources required by XJC, JXC and Runtime modules.
An artifact of well-named and well-specified annotations to power static analysis checks

The logging API of the Log4j project. Library and application code can log through this API. It contains a simple built-in implementation (`SimpleLogger`) for trivial use cases. Production applications are recommended to use Log4j API in combination with a fully-fledged implementation, such as Log4j Core.
Forwards the Log4j API calls to SLF4J. (Refer to the `log4j-slf4j[2]-impl` artifacts for forwarding SLF4J to the Log4j API.)
Core module of Micrometer containing instrumentation API and implementation

dependency.license: The GNU General Public License, v2 with Universal FOSS Exception, v1.0

evidence.name: Bundle-Name
evidence.value: Oracle Corporation's JDBC and XDevAPI Driver for MySQL

dependency.description: A Protocol for Asynchronous Non-Blocking Data Sequence

evidence.value: Non-Blocking Reactive Foundation for the JVM

dependency.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java
Core Spring concepts underpinning every Spring Data module.
Spring Data module for JPA repositories.
TXW is a library that allows you to write XML documents.
Advanced yet easy-to-use escape/unescape library for Java
